title: Fast Ukrainian Beef Skewers
description: Quick and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring beef skewers with a hint of vanilla, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is low in glycemic index and uses a wooden board for serving.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the split vanilla pod to the bowl and mix well.
Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the beef skewers with the marinade mixture, making sure they are fully coated.
Dry-brine the beef skewers with the brine mixture for 10 minutes.
Grill the beef skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked to the desired level of doneness.
Serve the beef skewers on a wooden board, garnished with fresh parsley or dill.
